backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages announcements and roster members using in-memory Maps, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both entities with timestamp-based sorting for announcements.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed UI features: centering the hero section brand name elements and replacing duplicate brand text with the logo image in HeroSection.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file across components, hooks, pages, and config.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom property color tokens for both light and dark themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest link, favicon references pointing to a tiger photo asset, and a service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and Urdu language setting.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with background refresh for GET requests, skipping cross-origin and /api/ calls, with offline fallback to index.html for navigation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, decorative accents, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood).
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements, wiring form state to backend mutation hooks with confirmation dialogs and loading indicators.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Renders a styled card for a single announcement, displaying its title, body, and formatted timestamp (converted from ICP nanoseconds) with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the Legend X Arena brand, navigation quick links, social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Facebook), and contact info.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders an animated hero section featuring a canvas-based shooting animation with a drawn arm, gun, bullets, shell casings, muzzle flash, and recoil effects.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Renders a fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background blur, desktop nav links, a CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Renders the news section by fetching announcements via a custom hook and displaying loading skeletons, error, empty, or a grid of AnnouncementCard components.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a styled player card showing an avatar image (with a default fallback), the player's name, and their role badge with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: Displays a dismissible top banner prompting users to install the PWA, handling the native install prompt for Android and showing manual instructions for iOS.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the roster section of the landing page, fetching team members via `useRoster` and displaying them in a grid of `PlayerCard` components with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members by calling the ICP backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for the design system, and adds esports-themed utility classes like glows, metallic text, and diagonal clips.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by rendering Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in sequence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom esports color tokens, typography fonts, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 7 for a frontend revert task, listing existing features around brand name styling/centering/logo replacement and four pending action requests targeting a full revert to Version 44 plus related UI fixes.
